_metadata.description: Round-3: exp_746 baseline + gentle InfoNCE sweep. Strict visualize_vaewc_filter.json gate before finetune.
_metadata.axes: lambda_proto × proto_temperature × proto_start_epoch × proto_full_epoch × proto_min_samples_per_class = 90 jobs
_metadata.strategy: Phase A implicit: exp_746-like cls schedule preserves kmeans; Phase B: weak InfoNCE after late GAN warmup
